name: sessions/16638769467548151530
title: Kaggle Notebook Deployment and Monitoring Workflow
prompt:
Working in the repo root (MasumRab/kaggle-notebooks-analysis):

Prerequisite: KAGGLE_API_TOKEN set as a Jules secret.

This prompt pushes already-migrated notebooks TO Kaggle (no local data download needed).
Kaggle provides the competition data inside its own kernel environment.

Step 1 — Generate kernel-metadata.json for each migrated competition that lacks one.
Check which kaggle/ dirs already have metadata:
  ls notebooks/*/kaggle/kernel-metadata.json

For any missing, run:
  python scripts/prepare_kaggle_push.py <slug>

Step 2 — Push all 8 migrated competitions one at a time. After each push, poll
status until complete or failed (max 20 minutes per competition):

  Batch 1 (tabular, no GPU needed): house-prices, lanl, rossmann
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/house-prices/kaggle/
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/lanl/kaggle/

  Batch 2 (vision, GPU): panda, aptos, melanoma
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/panda/kaggle/
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/aptos/kaggle/

  Batch 3 (NLP/other): bengali, ieee-fraud
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/bengali/kaggle/
    kaggle kernels push -p notebooks/ieee-fraud/kaggle/

For each push, record the result in qa_reports/
